feed.title: Arshtyi's Blog
feed.subtitle: Blog about my research and development.

entry.title: About Me
entry.content:
I am an undergraduate student in Computer Science and Technology (Artificial Intelligence) at Shandong University, China.

Interests

  • Science fiction
  • Collectible card games (especially Yu-Gi-Oh!)
  • Strategy games

Focus

I am passionate about combining knowledge, technology, and personal interests. My primary areas of interest and development are algorithms, programming languages.

Current Goals

  • Rust, CPP, CSharp, Go, Lean, Typst
  • Algorithms

Motto

"Explore the profound and subtle until even the smallest particle finds its place in the void; exhaust the mechanisms of the world as if a single drop plunges into a great abyss."

Contact Me

  • E-mail: arshtyi@foxmail.com
  • QQ: 640006128
  • WeChat: arshtyi_TRANTOR
